productDisplayName: Elle Women Black Etra Slim Fit Trousers
description: Black trousers, waistband with belt loops, button and zip closure, scooped cargo pockets on front with zipped pocket on top, pin tuck down front legs, patch pockets at back with press button fastened flaps, pin tuck down back legsOur stylist has paired these trousers with a black beltThis pair of trousers will not come with a belt
